ques: Calculate the estimated time to sunburn for different skin types when exposed to the sun at 1:00 pm with SPF 1 in Brazil.
answer: At 1:00 pm with SPF 1 in Brazil (Brasília), the estimated time to sunburn is: skin type I = 26 min, skin type II = 33 min, skin type III = 50 min, skin type IV = 1 h 10 min, skin type V = 1 h 58 min, and skin type VI = sunburn unlikely (UV exposure category: high).
